message:
fix: read Dolt database name from metadata.json in embedded mode (bd-pqn2e)

NewFromConfigWithOptions only read the database name (e.g. beads_test)
from metadata.json when in server mode, causing embedded-mode reopens to
fall back to the default beads database. This meant prefix-specific
config (issue_prefix) was invisible after init.

Also update BEADS_DIR tests to check for dolt directory instead of the
obsolete beads.db SQLite file, and skip BEADS_DB_OverridesBeadsDir
which does not apply to Dolt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/quartz
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
